TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Qgeri/ Qqri/ Qegiri = Beyhing bay qhuni mtuting wasaw na ka qqri nii, rmabang bay kndux ka rhiq qhuni na, msdalih sdhriq ka cida na, skkingal ka wasaw na, niqan bay tuura so knrtan rupung ka ssiyaw wasaw na, mbhuway ka bukuy wasaw na, mdakil ckcka bbuyu ddwiyaq. Tduwa uqun ka hiyi qqri nii, rmabang bay smkuxul mkan hiyi qhuni ka rapic ccamac dnii, kiya ka mniq ckcka lmahang puniq mi ddha hruwan qhuni nii u pusu bay kluwan qhuni uri, pngalan dha qqiya hmtur deyki, so spuyan mhnuk qhuni, cida qhuni nii u pngalan dha hmann ngiraw mi duhung dnii, qtinuh u slmuun phiyu sapah, tduruy, smalu asu, qtinuk sapah, mi thuwan puniq, kiya ka mtuting hiyi qhuni u hbaraw bay ka ita sediq miyah lmamu, skuwan na mi saan dha empulah. Mniq ta alang sediq hini pa, kntanan qmita ka qhuni qqri nii, kiya ka qhuni nii u lxan bay mangal, mi sklaan mdakil alang hini.
S.PHON: = qgəɾi/ qqɾi/ qəgiɾi = bəħiŋ baj qħuni mtutiŋ wasaw na ka qqɾi nii, ɾmabaŋ baj kndux ka ɾħiq qħuni na, msdaliħ sdħɾiq ka ʦida na, skkiŋal ka wasaw na, niqan baj tuuɾa so knɾtan ɾupuŋ ka ssijaw wasaw na, mbħuwaj ka bukuj wasaw na, mdakil ʦkʦka bbuju ddwijaq. tduwa uqun ka ħiji qqɾi nii, ɾmabaŋ baj smkuxul mkan ħiji qħuni ka ɾapiʦ ʦʦamaʦ dnii, kija ka mniq ʦkʦka lmaħaŋ puniq mi ddħa ħɾuwan qħuni nii u pusu baj kluwan qħuni uɾi, pŋalan dħa qqija ħmtuɾ dəki, so spujan mħnuk qħuni, ʦida qħuni nii u pŋalan dħa ħmann ŋiɾaw mi duħuŋ dnii, qtinuħ u slmuun pħiju sapaħ, tduɾuj, smalu asu, qtinuk sapaħ, mi tħuwan puniq, kija ka mtutiŋ ħiji qħuni u ħbaɾaw baj ka ita sədiq mijaħ lmamu, skuwan na mi saan dħa əmpulaħ. mniq ta alaŋ sədiq ħini pa, kntanan qmita ka qħuni qqɾi nii, kija ka qħuni nii u lxan baj maŋal, mi sklaan mdakil alaŋ ħini.
S.FORM: = Qgeri/ Qqri/ Qegiri = Beyhing bay qhuni mtuting wasaw na ka qqri nii, rmabang bay kndux ka rhiq qhuni na, msdalih sdhriq ka cida na, skkingal ka wasaw na, niqan bay tuura so knrtan rupung ka ssiyaw wasaw na, mbhuway ka bukuy wasaw na, mdakil ckcka bbuyu ddwiyaq. Tduwa uqun ka hiyi qqri nii, rmabang bay smkuxul mkan hiyi qhuni ka rapic ccamac dnii, kiya ka mniq ckcka lmahang puniq mi ddha hruwan qhuni nii u pusu bay kluwan qhuni uri, pngalan dha qqiya hmtur deyki, so spuyan mhnuk qhuni, cida qhuni nii u pngalan dha hmann ngiraw mi duhung dnii, qtinuh u slmuun phiyu sapah, tduruy, smalu asu, qtinuk sapah, mi thuwan puniq, kiya ka mtuting hiyi qhuni u hbaraw bay ka ita sediq miyah lmamu, skuwan na mi saan dha empulah. Mniq ta alang sediq hini pa, kntanan qmita ka qhuni qqri nii, kiya ka qhuni nii u lxan bay mangal, mi sklaan mdakil alang hini.
S.PHON: = qgəɾi/ qqɾi/ qəgiɾi = bəħiŋ baj qħuni mtutiŋ wasaw na ka qqɾi nii, ɾmabaŋ baj kndux ka ɾħiq qħuni na, msdaliħ sdħɾiq ka ʦida na, skkiŋal ka wasaw na, niqan baj tuuɾa so knɾtan ɾupuŋ ka ssijaw wasaw na, mbħuwaj ka bukuj wasaw na, mdakil ʦkʦka bbuju ddwijaq. tduwa uqun ka ħiji qqɾi nii, ɾmabaŋ baj smkuxul mkan ħiji qħuni ka ɾapiʦ ʦʦamaʦ dnii, kija ka mniq ʦkʦka lmaħaŋ puniq mi ddħa ħɾuwan qħuni nii u pusu baj kluwan qħuni uɾi, pŋalan dħa qqija ħmtuɾ dəki, so spujan mħnuk qħuni, ʦida qħuni nii u pŋalan dħa ħmann ŋiɾaw mi duħuŋ dnii, qtinuħ u slmuun pħiju sapaħ, tduɾuj, smalu asu, qtinuk sapaħ, mi tħuwan puniq, kija ka mtutiŋ ħiji qħuni u ħbaɾaw baj ka ita sədiq mijaħ lmamu, skuwan na mi saan dħa əmpulaħ. mniq ta alaŋ sədiq ħini pa, kntanan qmita ka qħuni qqɾi nii, kija ka qħuni nii u lxan baj maŋal, mi sklaan mdakil alaŋ ħini.
